rationale: This is a block/grid puzzle satisfaction hook — its mechanics (slotting blocks, clearing lines) have zero overlap with Crazy Kick's swipe-to-shoot, physics-based soccer loop, so a faithful adaptation isn't viable. The green/yellow/indigo palette partially rhymes with the game's sunny yellow + green accents, but the calm puzzle aesthetic clashes with the energetic stickman sports vibe and male 8–30 sports audience. Pass on adapting this archetype directly; only the "genius/psychopath" text-overlay meme could be borrowed onto a trick-shot montage if you want to test the satisfaction angle.
